_meta.notes: Cooking trainer. Found in hollow-market. Kethra runs the only working kitchen in the market and has fed more travelers than she can count. The same Kethra surfaced in the foreshadowing-memory tests as a face-echo — she's a recurring NPC.

tagline: tall, calm-faced, wraps her hair in a clean cloth before any meal.

behavior.default: stirs a pot of something dark with bay-leaves on top
narrativeHooks: Kethra remembers every face that ever ate at her counter. Some come back lifetimes later.
The salt is always exact. Never measured.

teachingLines: Salt makes everything what it already is.
If you can keep one person alive past tonight, you have learned the whole skill.
